Staff Portal

Submit a work request.

Facilities, supplies, tech, Montessori materials, or anything else you need.

Open submissions for now. Email-invite login coming soon. Requests email admin@peartreecs.com.

What can I request?

  • Facilities & Maintenance

    Broken/damaged items, lighting, plumbing, HVAC, cleaning

  • Classroom Supplies

    Paper, art supplies, consumables, books

  • Technology Support

    Chromebooks, printers, WiFi, accounts

  • Montessori Materials

    Sensorial, practical life, language, math materials

  • Plants & Classroom Pets

    Plant supplies, soil, classroom pet food/bedding

  • Curriculum & Books

    Book orders, lesson materials, field trip requests

  • HR / Administrative

    PTO, substitute requests, payroll questions

  • Room Booking

    Reserve classroom, gym, outdoor space

  • Other

    Anything else not covered above

Urgent?

If something is dangerous or blocking your class right now, please call directly.

(510) 817-4690

New request

Required fields marked with *. Photos help.

Your info

Request

Photo attachments? Reply to the email this opens with the photo attached.

Your email client should be open with the request ready to send.

If nothing opened, you can copy the request from below and email it to admin@peartreecs.com directly. 

 
  
 
 
 
  
  
 
 
 
Pear Tree CS
 
Social justice Montessori education serving preschool through 5th grade in Oakland, CA.
